link-in-text-block.tip: Add a non-color cue (underline, icon, or text) wherever color conveys meaning.
link-in-text-block.label: Links must be distinguishable without relying on color

region.tip: Use real headings, lists, table headers, and <label>s instead of visual styling alone.
region.label: All page content should be contained by landmarks

color-contrast.tip: Use at least 4.5:1 contrast for normal text and 3:1 for large or bold text.
color-contrast.label: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds

WCAG2AA.Principle1.Guideline1_4.1_4_3.G1.tip: Use at least 4.5:1 contrast for normal text and 3:1 for large or bold text.
WCAG2AA.Principle1.Guideline1_4.1_4_3.G1.label: This element is absolutely positioned and the background color can not be determined. Ensure the contrast ratio between the text and all covered parts of the background are at least 4.5:1.

WCAG2AA.Principle1.Guideline1_3.1_3_1.H4.tip: Use real headings, lists, table headers, and <label>s instead of visual styling alone.
WCAG2AA.Principle1.Guideline1_3.1_3_1.H4.label: If this element contains a navigation section, it is recommended that it be marked up as a list.

WCAG2AA.Principle1.Guideline1_4.1_4_3_F2.tip: Use at least 4.5:1 contrast for normal text and 3:1 for large or bold text.
WCAG2AA.Principle1.Guideline1_4.1_4_3_F2.label: Check that this element has an inherited background colour or image to complement the corresponding inline foreground colour.

WCAG2AA.Principle1.Guideline1_4.1_4_3.G1.tip: Use at least 4.5:1 contrast for normal text and 3:1 for large or bold text.
WCAG2AA.Principle1.Guideline1_4.1_4_3.G1.label: This element's text or background contains transparency. Ensure the contrast ratio between the text and background are at least 3:1.

WCAG2AA.Principle1.Guideline1_4.1_4_10.C.tip: Use responsive layouts so content reflows into one column at 320 CSS px wide.
WCAG2AA.Principle1.Guideline1_4.1_4_10.C.label: This element has "position: fixed". This may require scrolling in two dimensions, which is considered a failure of this Success Criterion.

WCAG2AA.Principle2.Guideline2_4.2_4_1.H6.tip: Add a skip-to-content link and use landmark regions.
WCAG2AA.Principle2.Guideline2_4.2_4_1.H6.label: Iframe element requires a non-empty title attribute that identifies the frame.

WCAG2AA.Principle1.Guideline1_3.1_3_1.H4.tip: Use real headings, lists, table headers, and <label>s instead of visual styling alone.
WCAG2AA.Principle1.Guideline1_3.1_3_1.H4.label: Heading markup should be used if this content is intended as a heading.

heading-order.tip: Use real headings, lists, table headers, and <label>s instead of visual styling alone.
heading-order.label: Heading levels should only increase by one

WCAG2AA.Principle1.Guideline1_3.1_3_1_A..tip: Use real headings, lists, table headers, and <label>s instead of visual styling alone.
WCAG2AA.Principle1.Guideline1_3.1_3_1_A..label: The heading structure is not logically nested. This h4 element should be an h3 to be properly nested.

WCAG2AA.Principle2.Guideline2_5.2_5_3.F9.tip: Include the visible label text within the control's accessible name.
WCAG2AA.Principle2.Guideline2_5.2_5_3.F9.label: Accessible name for this element does not contain the visible label text. Check that for user interface components with labels that include text or images of text, the name contains the text that is presented visually.

WCAG2AA.Principle1.Guideline1_4.1_4_3.G1.tip: Use at least 4.5:1 contrast for normal text and 3:1 for large or bold text.
WCAG2AA.Principle1.Guideline1_4.1_4_3.G1.label: This element's text or background contains transparency. Ensure the contrast ratio between the text and background are at least 4.5:1.

WCAG2AA.Principle1.Guideline1_3.1_3_1.H3.tip: Use real headings, lists, table headers, and <label>s instead of visual styling alone.
WCAG2AA.Principle1.Guideline1_3.1_3_1.H3.label: If this table is a data table, consider using a caption element to the table element to identify this table.

WCAG2AA.Principle1.Guideline1_3.1_3_1.H4.tip: Use real headings, lists, table headers, and <label>s instead of visual styling alone.
WCAG2AA.Principle1.Guideline1_3.1_3_1.H4.label: Align attributes .

image-alt.tip: Give informative images descriptive alt text; mark purely decorative images with empty alt="".
image-alt.label: Images must have alternative text

list.tip: Use real headings, lists, table headers, and <label>s instead of visual styling alone.
list.label: <ul> and <ol> must only directly contain <li>, <script> or <template> elements

listitem.tip: Use real headings, lists, table headers, and <label>s instead of visual styling alone.
listitem.label: <li> elements must be contained in a <ul> or <ol>

WCAG2AA.Principle2.Guideline2_1.2_1_1.G9.tip: Ensure every control and action works with the keyboard alone.
WCAG2AA.Principle2.Guideline2_1.2_1_1.G9.label: Ensure the functionality provided by an event handler for this element is available through the keyboard

WCAG2AA.Principle1.Guideline1_1.1_1_1.H3.tip: Give informative images descriptive alt text; mark purely decorative images with empty alt="".
WCAG2AA.Principle1.Guideline1_1.1_1_1.H3.label: Img element is the only content of the link, but is missing alt text. The alt text should describe the purpose of the link.

WCAG2AA.Principle4.Guideline4_1.4_1_2.H9.tip: Give custom controls a proper name, role, and state (often via ARIA).
WCAG2AA.Principle4.Guideline4_1.4_1_2.H9.label: Anchor element found with no link content and no name and/or ID attribute.

WCAG2AA.Principle4.Guideline4_1.4_1_2.H9.tip: Give custom controls a proper name, role, and state (often via ARIA).
WCAG2AA.Principle4.Guideline4_1.4_1_2.H9.label: Anchor element found with link content, but no href, ID or name attribute has been supplied.

WCAG2AA.Principle1.Guideline1_4.1_4_3.G1.tip: Use at least 4.5:1 contrast for normal text and 3:1 for large or bold text.
WCAG2AA.Principle1.Guideline1_4.1_4_3.G1.label: This element's text is placed on a background image. Ensure the contrast ratio between the text and all covered parts of the image are at least 4.5:1.

frame-tested.tip: Frames should be tested with axe-core
frame-tested.label: Frames should be tested with axe-core
